name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Soft Nappa Sheepskin Flamenco Purse features a pleated design with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile, it can be carried as a clutch, worn with the donut chain shoulder strap, or slung with the leather shoulder strap. This version is crafted from soft Nappa sheepskin. Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Detachable and adjustable leather strap*Detachable donut chain charm*Anagram embossed pebble texture*Subtle magnetic closure*Suede lining with gold or silver plating*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)
